title: Sovereign linear time — immutable; nothing adjusts the timer
motto: Time is linear — one axis, one direction. No way to affect linear time except to take time out. Temperature affects nothing on this timer.

immutable_linear.rule: Linear sovereign clock advances from sealed monotonic epoch only — never pauses, never freezes
immutable_linear.take_time_out_means: gap or red_flag when continuity or tamper is detected

kinds.gap: Monotonic/linear discontinuity — backward step or drift beyond MAX_LINEAR_GAP_MS
kinds.red_flag: Witness tamper — thermal spike, freq jump, micron flip, SQUIDGIE issues

commands.derived: Read linear_ns / derived_utc — never wall clock
commands.take-time-out: Record gap or red flag — does not pause clock

universal_clock.motto: Everyone everything everywhere knows sovereign time — never desync
